tools.Name: GenericAgent
tools.Description: A minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework that crystallizes execution paths into reusable skills.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex tasks (e.g., web exploration, data processing) that require evolving capabilities over time.

tools.Name: Cognee
tools.Description: A knowledge engine for building AI memory that combines vector search and graph databases.
tools.Use_Case: Providing long-term memory, context management, and cross-agent knowledge sharing for AI agents.

tools.Name: Magika
tools.Description: An AI-powered tool for fast and accurate detection of file types using deep learning.
tools.Use_Case: Automated security scanning, content policy enforcement, and reliable file classification in data pipelines.
